## What this changes

A short description of the change and why.

## Type of change

- [ ] Bug fix
- [ ] New feature
- [ ] Refactor / cleanup
- [ ] Documentation

## Checklist

- [ ] `npm run typecheck` passes
- [ ] `npm test` passes (tests use fixtures, not live feeds)
- [ ] Domain vocabulary from `CONTEXT.md` used where applicable
- [ ] Any deviation from the PRD/ADRs is documented (note in
      `docs/design/implementation-notes.md`, or a new `docs/adr/` entry)
- [ ] For dashboard changes: rebuilt locally and/or ran the browser e2e check

## Notes for reviewers

Anything data- or user-visible, follow-ups, or areas you'd like scrutiny on.
